activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor allowed to differ from invoice issuer if consignor name explicitly found elsewhere in invoice documents
Consignor Land normalization and exact matching
Prioritization rules for consignee identification in invoice
Consignee Land normalization and exact matching
Goods Description verification priority 1: item numbers
Quantity numeric value identification in invoice
Verification if multiple quantity values in certificate
Quantity MATCH/MISMATCH criteria and manual review triggers
EU Member State and EU origin interchangeability

consignor.certificate_value:
SKF Sverige AB
Kvibergs Broväg 8
SE-415 05, GÖTEBORG
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
SKF Sverige AB 
von Utfallsgatan 4 
415 50 Göteborg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SKF Sverige AB' in certificate was identified as invoice issuer 'SKF Sverige AB' despite slightly different street address (Kvibergs Broväg 8 vs von Utfallsgatan 4). Legal form 'AB' matched with allowed abbreviation rule. Land 'Sweden' matches exactly after normalization. (Rules 4.1.0, 4.1.3.6, 4.1.4)

consignee.certificate_value:
SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd
105 Ton Dat Tien,Tan Phu Ward 
c/o Schenker Logistics (M) S/B)
No D-08, Jalan Tanjung A/4
81560 Tanjung Pelepas, Pelabuhan 
Malaysia
consignee.invoice_value:
SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. 
c/o Schenker Logistics (M) S/B), No D-08, Jalan Tanjung 
A/4 
81560 Tanjung Pelepas, Pelabuhan 
Malaysia
consignee.motivation: Consignee in certificate 'SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd' matches exactly with invoice field 'Bill to' and 'Sold to' which takes priority for consignee verification. Addresses and land 'Malaysia' match exactly after normalization. (Rules 4.2.0.2, 4.2.2.1, 4.2.3)

goods_description.certificate_value:
71 COLLIE
DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM
SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
goods_description.invoice_value:
DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM
SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM
SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions in certificate match those in invoice with exact matching for product descriptions and item numbers (including 'SEG-25D-423075' from certificate matching invoice item numbers starting with same codes) with normalizations. (Rules 4.3.2, 4.3.8)

quantity.motivation: Quantity values in certificate (635 pcs and 545 pcs) are found in invoice as 625 pcs + 10 pcs (total 635 pcs) and 545 pcs respectively. Sum of invoice quantities equals certificate quantities appropriately. Units 'pcs' match. Quantity verification is according to main rules with allowance for summing invoice lines (manual summation confirmed in multiple invoice lines). (Rules 4.4.1, 4.4.2, 4.4.3, 4.4.3.1, 4.4.6)

origin.motivation: Origin country 'SWEDEN' in certificate is explicitly found in invoice under 'Country of origin' and matches after normalization including case and full name vs abbreviation. EU normalization rules not applicable here since certificate states specifically 'SWEDEN'. (Rules 4.5.4.1, 4.5.4.2)

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All relevant control points match explicitly after normalization and allowed exceptions. No mismatches or uncertainties found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan vidare granskning.
